name: Poached Chicken Breasts with Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
To poach chicken - Place the 4 chicken breasts (if you leave the skin on, skin side up) in a 12x8-inch microwave-safe baking dish, placing the thickest portions toward the outside edge of the dish. Lightly sprinkle each with seasoned salt, paprika, and pepper. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 12-14 minutes or until chicken is fork tender and juices run clear, turning halfway through cooking.
To prepare Dill Sauce - Place oleo in a 4-cup microwave-safe measuring cup. Microwave on HIGH for 30-40 seconds, or until melted. Stir in flour, salt, pepper, and mustard until smooth. Using a wire whisk, gradually blend in milk. Microwave on HIGH for 3-5 minutes or until the mixture thickens and boils, stirring twice during cooking. Stir in cheese and dill until cheese melts. Spoon over warm chicken.
